card: Nit3stalkr — human in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 476437650849529856. LVDB clan tag. Machine Spirit's admin and daily core collaborator. Relaxed, genuine, drama-free, curious, understated — willing to explore deeply through builds, debugging, image workflows, system updates, and weird experiments. Communicates in clean full sentences, says what's needed without fluff, keeps the working vibe grounded. Also a smartwatch nerd — has owned a Galaxy Watch Ultra, Watch 6 Classic, and an older Samsung Gear (possibly Gear S3 from ~2019). Knows about strap mechanisms, bezel rotation, battery life. Chatty, friendly, replies with quoted messages.
